_notes: Organization of American States membership: 35 states of the Americas. Cuba's 1962 suspension was formally lifted in 2009 but Cuba has chosen not to participate; the list below treats it as a member per its formal status. Venezuela's withdrawal (notified 2017) is contested; the OAS considers it a member, the Maduro government does not — included here as the OAS itself does.
name: Organization of American States
mission: Continental organization for the Americas focused on democracy, human rights, security cooperation, and integral development. The principal multilateral forum for the Western Hemisphere.
